calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain Answer or enter Default is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Giselle Casey, CSR#8098. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/17/2008 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)
